name: node-red-bin
description: Node-RED standalone binaries for all platforms

scripts.build:macos-x64: npm run prebuild && pkg . --targets node22-macos-x64 --output build/node-red-macos-x64
scripts.build:macos-arm64: npm run prebuild && pkg . --targets node22-macos-arm64 --output build/node-red-macos-arm64
scripts.build:linux-x64: npm run prebuild && pkg . --targets node22-linux-x64 --output build/node-red-linux-x64
scripts.build:win-x64: npm run prebuild && pkg . --targets node22-win-x64 --output build/node-red-win-x64.exe
